title: The puzzle of low Middle East Gulf oil storage levels
section_path: The puzzle of low Middle East Gulf oil storage levels
section_path_text: The puzzle of low Middle East Gulf oil storage levels
summary:
Main
Many expect crude storage levels in the Middle East Gulf to reach tank tops - but do they? By David Wech
There is quite a lot of speculation on when oil storage in the Middle East Gulf will reach tank tops. Most are thinking producers will continue to keep production up as long as they can.
